server/tests/test_gif_roundtrip.py :: test_png_to_gif_to_png_preserves_dimensions
def test_png_to_gif_to_png_preserves_dimensions() -> None:
    source = png_bytes(gradient_raster(40, 30))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(source, "gradient.png")
    gif = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=2)
    roundtrip = load_raster_from_bytes(gif, "gradient.gif")
    assert roundtrip.width == 40
    assert roundtrip.height == 30

server/tests/test_gif_roundtrip.py :: test_gif_to_jpeg_conversion
def test_gif_to_jpeg_conversion() -> None:
    gif = convert_raster(solid_raster(16, 16, 100, 150, 200), OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=1)
    jpeg = convert_raster(load_raster_from_bytes(gif, "solid.gif"), OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=1)
    assert jpeg.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")
    decoded = decode_image(jpeg)
    assert decoded.width == 16
    assert decoded.height == 16

server/tests/test_gif_roundtrip.py :: test_gif_encode_decode_color_accuracy
def test_gif_encode_decode_color_accuracy() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(12, 12, 64, 128, 192)
    gif = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=1)
    decoded = load_raster_from_bytes(gif, "solid.gif")
    assert _pixel_delta(decoded.data, raster.data) < 10

server/tests/test_gif_roundtrip.py :: test_gif_gradient_palette_loss_is_bounded
def test_gif_gradient_palette_loss_is_bounded() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(48, 36)
    gif = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=2)
    decoded = load_raster_from_bytes(gif, "gradient.gif")
    assert _pixel_delta(decoded.data, raster.data) < 55

server/tests/test_gif_roundtrip.py :: test_decode_gif_via_formats_helper
def test_decode_gif_via_formats_helper() -> None:
    gif = convert_raster(solid_raster(9, 7, 255, 0, 0), OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=1)
    raster = decode_image(gif, "sample.gif")
    assert raster.width == 9
    assert raster.height == 7
